title: taraxacum retortum
intro: Taraxacum retortum, also known as the Irish dandelion, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the dandelion family. This plant is used for its medicinal properties, which include its ability to act as a diuretic, reducing inflammation and relieving digestive issues. The health benefits of Taraxacum retortum include reducing blood pressure, improving liver function, and boosting the immune system. Taraxacum retortum can be prepared in various herbal forms, such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to treat a range of health conditions.
